title: vicia rerayensis
intro: Vicia rerayensis, also known as the Bird's Foot Trefoil or Big Trefoil, is a perennial flowering plant in the legume family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues and its potential to lower blood sugar levels. The health benefits of Vicia rerayensis include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation in the body. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, are often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
